section_name: Law enforcement agency response to report of violation of ORS 811.155
chapter_title: Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
text: Upon receipt of a report containing the information required by ORS 811.157 (Report by driver of violation of ORS 811.155) (2), the law enforcement agency shall determine the name and address of the registered owner of the vehicle and shall send the registered owner a letter informing the owner that the vehicle was observed violating ORS 811.155 (Failure to stop for bus safety lights) . The letter shall include, at a minimum, information from the report filed under ORS 811.157 (Report by driver of violation of ORS 811.155) specifying the time and place of the alleged violation. [1987 c.654 §3]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 811. Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
##### § 811.159 — Law enforcement agency response to report of violation of ORS 811.155

Upon receipt of a report containing the information required by ORS 811.157 (Report by driver of violation of ORS 811.155) (2), the law enforcement agency shall determine the name and address of the registered owner of the vehicle and shall send the registered owner a letter informing the owner that the vehicle was observed violating ORS 811.155 (Failure to stop for bus safety lights) . The letter shall include, at a minimum, information from the report filed under ORS 811.157 (Report by driver of violation of ORS 811.155) specifying the time and place of the alleged violation. [1987 c.654 §3]

The letter shall include, at a minimum, information from the report filed under ORS 811.157 (Report by driver of violation of ORS 811.155) specifying the time and place of the alleged violation. [1987 c.654 §3]
